title: Bridge Essay: The One Where They Brain-Tune for Social Cognition: Multi-Modal Brain-Tuning on Friends

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Social Incarnation** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Social cognition, intersubjectivity, gestural communication.
